feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Serial Number Profile Change
entry.content:
Hi Team,

What will happen if we add serialization procedure POSL to serial number profile for existing materials? What is the best approach to do this?

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: SAP PS Project system - display costs under maintenance order level
entry.content:
Greetings,

we are wondering if it possible to display costs in project under maintenance order level using transaction CN41N. We have several maintenance orders linked to WBS elements. These orders have different costs planned:

  • internal labour
  • external service
  • stock material
  • non stock material

We are able to see costs in transaction CN41N but only until maintenance order level. Below all values are 0.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Serial Number is locked by User error in MIGO
entry.content:
Hi Team,

For Refurbishment work order process when we post Transfer Posting  and immediately post Goods Receipt in MIGO for same purchase order then we get an error as "Serial Number is already locked by user". What is the Cause and how to fix it?

Note: If we do Transfer Posting and do Goods Receipt after 5 mins then there is no issue.

Regards,

Jaya

entry.title: Technical Object Breakdowns - relationship Comp code & Maintenance Plants missing per design or gap?
entry.content:
Noticed no data shown when opening Technical Object Breakdowns - S/4HANA Cloud. Even when selecting all maint plants. Already found the rootcause and the workaround (see below) but do not like it from a user experience.

Apparently, there’s no association with Technical object and Company Code and that’s causing below. Is that as per design and something we need to live with or something we’re missing in the dataloads?

We advise users to set default setting so they do not need to fill in e.g. company code each and every time in each app (unfortunate btw this can not be defaulted centrally for all endusers)

Clearing comp code

entry.title: How to force measurement point entry in PM order confirmation?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

we assigned measuerment points to some of our functional locations to track run time for liquids ran through a pipe for example.

Is there a possibility to force the user to enter actual status of the measurement point (actual counter) during PM order confirmation or at least during completion of the PM order?

We have S4CORE (SAPK-10701INS4CORE).

As of now I did not found anything excepts development what I cannot believe that this is the only way.

thanks in advance.

Best regards

Patrick

entry.title: Asset Viewer and Asset Overview app gaps
entry.content:
2 questions related to 2 critical apps for EAM

Asset Viewer app

why is navigation window so super small at the left and is so much space blank at the right. from a UX perspective this is far from useless for endusers. hope its a quick win to improve by expanding the window at the left at least 

Asset Overview app

this new 2602 was highly anticipated within our organisation to remove some of the gaps so far between Public Cloud and our original ECC setup. several asks 

  • Why not possible to expand to full view technical object, equipment, BOM, material. See Asset viewer technical object as reference.
  • why so limited amount of columns/slicers available 
  • link to measurement points history across the technical object or at individual equipment levels in the roadmap? 
  • Cumulative risk visual in the roadmap? 

keen to hear how other companies cope with this and to hear from SAP when/what will be changed in these 2 apps. Are last 2 bullets covered by different SAP products like APM or anticipated to have this also within Public Cloud EAM as basic functionality?

entry.title: Change workorder access removed since mid march
entry.content:
Since mid march we have more and more of our front line users complaining they can not all of a sudden edit workorders anymore. We have thousands of workorders each year and 90% of our users are EAM users working with workorders day in day out. Did notice on the 15th SAP ALM changes. Did SAP incorrectly change authorizations? More clients observing the same and more importantly- found a solution?

Heard someone mentioning it can be caused by fields added with Extensibility but that would suprise me a thats a clean core pattern. New /updated apps a cause???

entry.title: SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant Asset Management (EAM)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I recently tried 1 attempt to my Exame to become a SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Asset Management, my score was 50% and the cut score is 70%. It was my first time trying this kind of exam and the system does not give you a feedback where you should improve or what part of the exam you was worse. I'd like to know if some of you have tried the new format exam and how was your experience? If I perform more things that the exame ask me to do, Will I be penalized?
Best regards.

entry.title: Order Generation Behavior in MPLAN After Restarting RISTRA20 Batch Job
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

If We temporarily stopped the RISTRA20 batch job on 22 April due to cutover activities. The job will be restart on 30 April.

I would like to understand the scheduling behavior in this scenario:

  • When the RISTRA20 job resumes, will the Maintenance Plan (MPLAN) generate the missed orders for the period 23–29 April
  • Will the system continue scheduling only from 30 April onward, ignoring the missed dates?
  • What will happen to the orders created retrospectively does client has to address them.

FYI: There is no Completion Requirement checked in existing MPLAN.

Your guidance on how SAP handles backdated calls in such situations, and any related configuration considerations, will be highly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: S/4 HANA EAM - Maintenance order - Display PRT original document assigned to operation
entry.content:
Greetings,

we are looking for the easiest way to display original files assigned to document linked to maintenance order via production resources and tools (PRT). These PRTs can be linked directly to maintenance order operation or are linked to a task list operation (for preventive maintenance scenarios).  

We would like to offer our maintenance personel the option to review maintenance instructions before  or during exection of maintenance tasks.

So far we have tried the following:

  • Find maintenance orders and operations app - F2173
  • Perform maintenance jobs app - F5104A
  • GUI transactions - IW33, IW32, IW41, IW42, IW44, ....

In the examples we have tried there is no direct way to display the original - first we need to display the document info record (DIR) and from it open the original.  From Fiori apps there is even no direct link to DIR we have to copy paste DIR number to Manage documents app.

Additionaly we are looking for a way to display documents linked directly to maintenance order reference technical object (EQ or FL)  - similar to what is already available in GUI. 

Thank you for your help.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: How to handle old open PM notifications after catalog profile and scoring changes?
entry.content:
• We use IW22 Task tab catalogs with parent parameter + child code
  • Earlier 17 parent parameters, now total 21 selections including 4 CI
  • Validation now enforces exactly 21 selections and single selection per parent
  • Old open notifications still show old parent parameters
  • New CI values and changed scores are not visible
  • Around 1300 notifications are open in OSNO/NOPR
  • New parent parameters were created instead of changing old ones
  • Need guidance on best approach for old open notifications

Questions

  1. Can existing notifications adopt new catalog structure/profile?
  2. If not, what is the best workaround?
  3. How should old-to-new score mapping be done?
  4. A major concern is that a child parameter needs to be deleted if that possible, kindly suggest.

entry.title: SAP PM modules ITOB - TPLNR customizing
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I want to add new data in  ITOB - TPLNR (T-code: IE02).  How can I do this?

Thx.

entry.title: S/4 HANA - different PRT behaviour in Fiori applications
entry.content:
Greetings,

we are having some issues with Fiori aopplications usied in EAM/PM/AM processes. We are experiencing different behaviour depending on which Fiori application we use to access maintenance order data. Focus is on management of production resources and tools (PRT).

We are wonding if anyone has had a similar issue and if we are perhaps missing some configuration. These are all standard applications without any enhancments.

1. APP Perform Maintenance Job - in the same row SAP states that there are no PRT while the total PRT count is 4

2. APP Manage Maintenance Orders - documents are not shown as PRT and it is not possible to add them in the order - the category D is miissing from dropdown list

3. APP Maintenance orders - all PRT are displayed correctly

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Delay one operation of task in maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi!

I created a task with multiple operations.

All operations have a weekly cycle, but one of them has a 6 week cycle.

Now I want to create multiple maintenance plans which reference this task; my problem is, if I launch them at the same time, every maintenance plan will bring up the 6 week cycle operation on the same week.

Right now I see one option: launch the plans with a week delay each, this way the 6 week cycle operation will have a week delay aswell (compared to the other maintenance plans)

But is there a way to delay the operation itself when launching the plan? This way I could launch all the plans at once, but that one operation will have a delay.

Thanks in advance, I hope my question is understandable

entry.title: unable to delete PR in service order
entry.content:
HI team service created PR external created then PO created , PO gr 101 done then GR 102 reversed then PR relevant operation deleted , stil that PR unbale to delete , even similar case available for other order operation that PR deleted , PR deletion option found grade out , 

here looking help delete PR any how , any possible way please suggest us

entry.title: Define Long Text Control for Order Types Configuration is missing
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for the reply for this url 

 

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP PM System Analyst
entry.content:
Greetings, may I ask what does a SAP PM System Analyst do? I have gotten more interested in SAP analysis I would really like to get certified and I feel this is the beginning of my journey.

Thank you.

entry.title: Plant creation design with S4 and Ariba as Indirect Procurement
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

We are having an S4 Implementation and we are confused with the strategy of creating New plants in S4. We are a manufacturing company and have the below structure.
1) Real Plants where manufacturing happens
2) Corporate office Locations where only Indirect Purchasing happens
3) Corporate office Locations where we sell Products and do Indirect Purchasing

Do we need to create plants for our corporate offices for indirect, non-manufacturing purchasing, corporate salaries, etc?
In which scenarios we need to Create Plants in S4?

We will be using Ariba for Indirect Procurement. Any help is appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Make F2173 - Add Time Confirmation - Personnel Number Mandatory
entry.content:
For the Fiori App F2173, When we click on Go with or with out any filter. We are getting list of work order.
Once we click any workorder line and click on time confirmation, we get pop up. In that we have personnel number which is not mandatory.

 To make this field mandatory I have tried few things 
1. UI adapt - SAP didn't give the option to Make the field mandatory  -  not working

2. BADIs - BADI EAM_ORDER_FIELD_CONTROL(Not triggering), Workorder confirm and others  like  are running on update task., So couldn't raise an error message. 2708958, 3515215 BADI also not helped - not working

3. CDS extension(C_ObjPgMaintOrderAndOperation) - This makes the main selection screen mandatory  - not working

Please help me about the approach

entry.title: SAP Certified - Implementation Consultant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Asset Management
entry.content:
Buenos días, 

¿Alguien sabría cómo es la nueva certificación para SAP PM (C_S43)? ¿conocen algún sitio web donde poder practicar o ver simulaciones reales?

Un Saludo.
